title: Create: Old Copper Stuffs
description: Brings Back Create's Copper Stuffs Textures Such as Scaffoldings, All fluid items, Copper Building Blocks, and More To pre 6.0.0!
body:
This Resource Pack Brings Back Create's Old Copper Textures, Including Scaffoldings, Copper Table Cover, All fluid items, copper shingles, and a whole lot more back to the Old Copper Textures! If you thought that the new textures were bad, you can use this pack to revert all copper texture changes!

Currently Supported Blocks:

    - Every Fluid Related Blocks Such as Fluid Pipes
       

    - Every Copper Building Blocks Including Their Oxidized Variants
       

    - Every Block That Has Slight Amount Of Copper In It Such As the Stock Link and Display Link
       

    - New Blocks That Include Copper Textures Such As the Table Cover or The Stock Ticker
       

Currently Supported Items:

    - Every Item Variant of The Blocks
       

    - Newly Created Items That Has Copper In It Such as the Transmitter
       

    - Every Copper Related Item Such as the Copper Sheet
       

    - Potato Cannon
       

I hope you enjoy the pack!
